brain.title: Memory
brain.subtitle: All durable facts the agents have learned

empty.title: No memories yet
empty.description: Connect an AI provider in Settings → Providers and let your agents start learning.

timeline.title: Memory timeline
timeline.subtitle: Chronological log of what your agents learned and when. Newest first.
timeline.empty: No memory events in this period yet.
timeline.error: Couldn't load the timeline. Try refreshing.

diff.title: Memory diff
diff.subtitle: What changed in memory across the selected window.
diff.emptyAdded: No new facts in this window.
diff.emptyForgotten: No facts forgotten in this window.
diff.emptyUpdated: No fact edits in this window.
diff.error: Couldn't load the diff. Try refreshing.

export.title: Export your memory
export.subtitle: All durable facts, decisions, relations, and citations the agents have learned about your workspace.
export.jsonDescription: Full export — facts, decisions, relations, citations. Best for reimport or analysis.
export.csvDescription: One row per fact. Doesn't include decisions or relations.
export.error: Couldn't generate export. Please try again.
export.notReady: Export isn't available yet — try again in a minute.

schema.facts: id, scope, kind, subject, statement, confidence, pinned, status, createdAt, updatedAt.
schema.decisions: Distilled decisions logged by agents (id, statement, rationale, links to source facts).
schema.relations: Edges between facts (subject ↔ predicate ↔ object, with confidence).
schema.citations: Pointers to the source messages that produced each fact — message IDs, not message bodies.

export.privacyBody: This export contains everything your agents remember about this workspace. It does not include source conversations themselves — only references to them (message IDs).

undo.title: Recent changes
undo.subtitle: The last 20 changes to memory. Revert any of them from the last 7 days.
undo.windowNote: Only changes from the last 7 days are revertible. Older entries are shown for reference.
undo.comingSoonBody: We'll show every memory change here as soon as the audit feed lands.
undo.error: Couldn't load the change log. Try refreshing.
undo.revertUnsupported: This change can't be reverted automatically yet.

sensitivity.toggleHelp: Pause memory extraction for this conversation. You can turn it back on anytime.
sensitivity.bannerPaused: Memory learning is paused for this conversation.

charts.agentPerformanceSub: current month · ordered by token consumption

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or go back home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

teams.title: No teams yet
teams.description: Create your first AI team and let them work for you.

agents.title: No agents here
agents.description: Agents are the building blocks of your AI teams.

conversations.title: No conversations yet
conversations.description: Conversations will appear here once employees start chatting.

employees.title: No employees loaded
employees.description: Import your team via CSV or add them one by one.

auth.startFree: Start building AI teams for free
auth.name: Full name
auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your workspace at a glance
dashboard.noData: No data yet — seed your database to see analytics.

org.title: Org Chart
org.subtitle: Your AI hierarchy: teams of agents orchestrating flows. Click a node to open it.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Your AI agent teams
teams.empty: No teams yet. Create your first team to get started.
teams.confirmDelete: Delete this team? All agents will be unassigned.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure and manage all the AI agents in your workspace.

studio.flowAgentDescription: This agent doesn't use a prompt. Each message runs the flow selected in the Advanced tab.
studio.noFlowSelected: ⚠ No flow selected. Go to Advanced and pick one.

testChat.title: Test chat
testChat.emptyHint: Type a message to test the agent with the current configuration.
testChat.messagePlaceholder: Type a message (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)…
testChat.providerNotConfigured: Configure the provider in Settings to use this model.

memory.title: Persistent memory
memory.description: The agent can read/write these memories through the memory_get / memory_set tools. They're also injected automatically into the system prompt at the start of every conversation.

config.flowResponseHint: The flow must return a `response` variable for the agent to reply.
config.toolsSectionSubtitle: The agent can call them during the conversation
config.conversationSectionSubtitle: How each chat starts and ends
config.greetingPlaceholder: Hi! How can I help you today?
config.fallbackPlaceholder: I couldn't understand you, can you rephrase?
config.startersLabel: Initial suggestions (buttons the user can tap)
config.maxTurnsLabel: Max turns (ends the chat after N exchanges)
config.responseSectionSubtitle: How it should structure the output

promptGen.step1Placeholder: I need an agent that qualifies B2B leads using BANT and routes them to the right rep…
promptGen.providerError: Configure a provider in Settings to use the generator.

promptEditor.placeholder: Write the agent's system prompt or use the AI generator…

modelPicker.noModels: No models available. Connect a provider in Settings.
modelPicker.noConnected: Configure a provider in Settings to see models.

versions.title: Version history
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore this version? Current changes will be lost.

flows.title: Flows
flows.subtitle: Connect your agents into visual pipelines that run automatically.
flows.emptyDescription: Create your first flow to start orchestrating agents.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.emptyTitle: Tell me what you want to automate 👇
copilot.emptyHint: For example: “when a message arrives, look up my knowledge base and reply with an agent”. If you have an API, paste its link and I'll wire the step for you.
copilot.explainFlowPrompt:
Explain in plain language, for a non-technical reader, what this flow does step by step:

{describe}
copilot.reviewErrorsPrompt:
Review this flow and tell me, in plain language, whether it has errors, unconfigured steps, or missing connections. Do not use the set_flow tool, only explain:

{describe}
copilot.connectionError: There was a connection issue. Try again.
copilot.inputPlaceholder: Describe what you want to happen…

palette.noMatches: We didn't find any step matching “{query}”.

builder.copilotTooltip: Copilot: build the flow by talking
builder.fillRunData: Fill in the data you want to test the flow with.
builder.noRunDataNeeded: This flow doesn't need data to start.
builder.runNoFieldsHint: Click "Run" to launch it. If you want, add variables to the flow from the variables button.

inspector.nameHelp: How it appears in the flow.
inspector.noIntegrations: No integrations connected. Go to <link>Integrations</link> to connect one.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Upload documents so your agents can answer with your own information (RAG).
knowledge.emptyDescription: Create the first one and upload documents to feed your agents.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Your team directory
employees.empty: No employees yet. Import your team to get started.

budget.prompt: Monthly budget in USD for {name} (empty = no limit)
budget.invalid: Budget must be a number ≥ 0 or empty

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Every interaction with an agent, on every channel.
conversations.emptyDescription: When an agent receives messages, you'll see them here.
conversations.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or summary…

drawer.takeoverPrompt: Take the conversation to write as human

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Connect your agents to the channels where your customers and employees are.
channels.snippetHelp: Paste this script before {tag} on any HTML page.
channels.telegramReplacePlaceholder: •••••••• (already set, paste a new one to replace)

widget.label: Web Widget
widget.description: Embed a chat on any site with a script.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Connect via Twilio or Meta Cloud API. (Adapter ready, requires account).

slack.label: Slack
slack.description: Slash commands and DMs. (Requires Slack app).

api.label: API
api.description: Public endpoint with secret to trigger agents from code.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Orchester with the tools you already use. Credentials are stored encrypted and each integration exposes actions your agents can run.
integrations.footer: 💡 Connected integrations expose their actions as tools agents can use. Credentials are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM).
integrations.oauthNote: Requires registering an OAuth app. Paste your client ID/secret; the auth flow happens after.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Token consumption and cost breakdown by agent
usage.noData: No data available for this period.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Workspace configuration

general.title: General
general.description: Basic workspace info visible to all members.
general.slugHint: Not editable. Appears in the workspace URL.
general.timezoneHint: Used for dashboard and report dates.
general.roleHint: Only owners and admins can edit.

account.title: My account
account.emailHint: To change your email, contact support.
account.deleteAccountDescription: Wipes your account and all your data. If you're the sole owner of any workspace, the workspace and its content are deleted too.
account.deleteModalDescription: This removes your user from the DB. Cannot be undone. To confirm, type your email:

developers.noApiKeys: You haven't created any API keys yet.
developers.keyNameAria: Name for the new API key
developers.keyCreated: API key created — copy it now, you won't see it again
developers.copyOnceWarning: ⚠️ Copy it now — only shown once:

providers.noProvidersEmpty: You haven't connected any providers yet. Search below and connect one with your API key.
providers.aggregatorHint: + accepts any other model by id.
providers.whereDoIGetKey: Where do I get the key? →

billing.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe not configured — set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_PRICE_*

audit.loadError: Could not load the audit log.

twoFactor.enabledBanner: 2FA enabled. Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.backupCodesWarning: Save these codes somewhere safe. They let you log in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code can only be used ONCE.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.) and then enter the 6-digit code.
twoFactor.pasteUrl: Paste this URL into your app:
twoFactor.disabledHint: 2FA is not enabled. Recommended for owner/admin accounts.

sections.providersDescription: Connect AI providers (chat, image, embeddings, video, audio and more) with your own API key. Available models show up in the agent editor and flows.
sections.billingDescription: Your plan, monthly usage and limits.
sections.sessionsDescription: Devices connected to your account. Close them remotely if you suspect a compromise.
sections.auditDescription: Every critical workspace mutation is recorded here. Read-only.
sections.developersDescription: API keys, outbound webhooks, and the public API reference.

settings.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted.
settings.teamDescription: Manage who has access to this workspace.

step1.title: Welcome to Orchester
step1.description: Let's set up your workspace in under 2 minutes.

step2.title: Connect your AI provider
step2.description: Add an API key to power your agents. You can change this later.

step3.title: Choose a starting point
step3.description: Pick a ready-made team or start from scratch.

step4.title: Load your employees
step4.description: Import your team so agents can greet them by name.
step4.skipForNow: Skip for now — I'll do this later

delete.title: Delete {name}
delete.willHide: Hide the workspace from all members
delete.willEmail: Send you an email with a restore link
delete.windowExplainer: You have {days} days to restore. After that, all data is permanently deleted.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the workspace slug to confirm:

restore.title: Restore {name}
restore.tokenHint: Paste the token from the deletion email. Optional if you're the original owner.
restore.expiredOrInvalid: This recovery link is expired or invalid.
restore.expiredOrInvalidBody: If you believe this is a mistake, contact support — the workspace may already have been restored, the 30-day window may have passed, or you may need to be signed in as the owner.

suspended.title: This workspace is paused (read-only)
suspended.body: You can view data and export, but cannot edit or send messages.

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.intro: Transfer ownership of {name} to another admin. This is irreversible — you will become an admin.
transfer.noEligible: No other admins available. Promote a member to admin first.
transfer.passwordHint: We re-verify your password to defend against session hijack.
transfer.ackLabel: I understand I will become an admin and need to log in again
transfer.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} min.
transfer.notAMember: The selected user is no longer a member.

featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.subtitle: Enable experimental features for this workspace.

listPage.title: Your workspaces
listPage.recentlyDeleted: Recently deleted workspaces can still be restored:

errors.notAMember: You're not a member of this workspace
errors.rateLimited: You're doing that too often. Try again in {minutes} min.
errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (3-40 chars).
errors.slugTaken: That slug is already taken. Try {suggestion}.

memory.title: Memory operations
memory.subtitle: On-demand triggers for the Mnemosyne housekeeping crons. Each action enqueues a job that runs in the next worker tick.
memory.adminOnly: Only workspace admins can trigger memory operations.

health.name: Memory health snapshot
health.description: Recomputes the memory health snapshot for this workspace (fact counts, embedding coverage, recall hit-rate, contradictions).

dedup.name: Dedup pass
dedup.description: Merges near-duplicate facts (cosine ≥ 0.92) into a single primary record. Idempotent — re-runs find nothing to do.

prune.name: Prune inactive facts
prune.description: Archives unpinned facts with no recall hits, age > 90 days, and relevance < 0.1. Reversible from the archive.

consolidation.name: REM-style consolidation
consolidation.description: Clusters related facts and writes a one-sentence summary that supersedes them. Originals stay findable.

review-sweep.name: Review-queue sweep
review-sweep.description: Surfaces low-confidence facts into the review queue for human triage (cap 50 per run).

auto-pin.name: Auto-pin pass
auto-pin.description: Evaluates the auto-pin rule set against active facts and pins matches. Skips user-overridden rows.

summary.name: Summary refresh
summary.description: Pre-distills a per-(agent, user) memory summary so the next chat turn skips the LLM round-trip.
summary.requiresAgent: Trigger from agent settings — needs a specific agent.

confirm.title: Run {op}?
confirm.body: This will enqueue the job for this workspace. It runs on the next worker tick — usually within a minute.

toast.enqueued: Job enqueued — runs in the next worker tick.
